channel.title: Ebpf on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Ebpf on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Best Self-Hosted eBPF Networking & Observability Tools: Cilium vs Pixie vs Tetragon 2026
item.description: eBPF (extended Berkeley Packet Filter) has fundamentally changed how we observe, secure, and manage Linux networking and applications. By running sandboxed programs directly inside the kernel, eBPF tools can intercept system calls, parse network packets, and trace function executions with near-zero overhead — no agents, no sidecars, no kernel module recompilation.
